posts.author: Midnight
posts.title: State of the Network - June 2026 | Midnight blog
posts.excerpt: June sees continued momentum in the developer ecosystem, independently verified by the Electric Capital developer report. This edition of State of the Network reviews all the programs and pathways in the Midnight ecosystem along with the release of Midnight Expert, new tutorials and partnership announcement.

posts.author: Midnight
posts.title: What it takes to build docs worth reading
posts.excerpt: From 476 to 1,900+ commits: See how the Midnight Developer Relations team treated documentation like a product and completely transformed the developer hub.

posts.author: Midnight
posts.title: Electric Capital report highlights growing momentum across the Midnight ecosystem | Midnight blog
posts.excerpt: The Electric Capital report documents rising developer activity on Midnight. New AI tools, mainnet primitives, and partner sprints continue to drive ecosystem growth.

posts.author: Midnight
posts.title: Turnkey partners with Midnight Foundation to simplify embedded wallet integration
posts.excerpt: Turnkey is bringing its flexible APIs and SDKs to the Midnight network, empowering developers to build seamless, user-friendly wallets for DApps.

posts.author: Midnight
posts.title: Blog | How the Nightforce drives global momentum for Midnight
posts.excerpt: The Nightforce ambassador program drives the global expansion of the Midnight ecosystem. Learn how dedicated volunteers share their knowledge about programmable privacy, organize international meetups, and represent the network at major industry events.

posts.author: Midnight
posts.title: Supercharging the Midnight ecosystem with the Night Sky accelerator
posts.excerpt: The Midnight Foundation is launching the Night Sky Accelerator, a 10-week program starting July 2026 to help early-stage teams integrate zero-knowledge privacy features and scale commercial applications.

posts.author: Midnight
posts.title: Hilo hackathon winners keep privacy on track across four categories
posts.excerpt: Builders solved real-world problems using the Midnight network during the Hilo Hackathon. Teams developed privacy-preserving applications for healthcare, finance, AI, and identity over a two-week period. These winning projects show how zero-knowledge technology secures sensitive data across a range of verticals.

posts.author: Midnight
posts.title: Understanding the multiple pathways to generating DUST
posts.excerpt: The Midnight network uses a dual-component model where the NIGHT token generates the DUST resource. This guide explains how UTXO-based architecture enables flexible fee sponsorship and community-funded decentralized applications while users maintain custody of their assets.

posts.author: Midnight
posts.title: State of the Network - May 2026
posts.excerpt: The Midnight ecosystem takes Consensus Miami by storm. Read about the upcoming applications, integrations, and tools bringing programmable privacy to the real world.

posts.author: Midnight
posts.title: Blog | Midnight at Consensus Miami: Smart compliance and the trillion dollar opportunity
posts.excerpt: The Midnight network is live, and demonstrations at Consensus Miami show how developers and institutions are demonstrating the capabilities of the world’s first fourth-generation blockchain. Tools like the Midnight Passport and the collateral warehouse addressing the accessibility gaps, privacy shortcomings and trillion dollar financial opportunities. As AI agents increase personal data risks, programmable privacy ensures users maintain control, proving that the future of compliance is programmable.
